---
title: "About"
---

![](assets/me.jpg){width="50%"}

# Introduction

I am Lennart, a Master’s student of Data Science with an interest in quantitative and computational methods of Political Science. I work as a research assistant for [Max Schaub](https://maxschaub.eu/) at the University of Hamburg. Currently, we are investigating the generational effect of wartime victimization on interpersonal trust and social norms in the [WarGen-Project](https://wargen.eu/index.html), and on how behavioral responses to violence translate into health outcomes for the [ViVac-Project](https://vivac.info/index.html). 

Github: [kssrr](https://github.com/kssrr)

ORCiD: [0009-0007-0052-5973](https://orcid.org/0009-0007-0052-5973)

Mail: [lennart.kasserra@uni-hamburg.de](mailto:lennart.kasserra@uni-hamburg.de)
